figures.caption: Table 1. Comparison of Feature Extractors on Embedded Hardware using the HPatches dataset. Best results are highlighted in bold, computed separately for full-precision (float32) and quantized (int8) models.
Table 2. Relative performance change (∆%) on the HPatches dataset due to int8 quantization. Positive values indicate an improvement after quantization.
Figure 1. Overview of the baseline functional topology, inspired by the original SuperPoint [4].
Table 4. Ablation study on descriptor dimensionality evaluated on the HPatches dataset. Values in parentheses show the relative change (∆%) due to quantization.
Figure 2. Qualitative results on TUM-VI. The green lines indicate predicted correspondences. The depicted image pair is not part of the training set.
